query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(split_part(title, ' ', 1), '') as "keyword!",
            SUM(view_count)::BIGINT as "count!"
        FROM posts
        WHERE
            published_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
            AND status = 'published'
            AND deleted_at IS NULL
            AND title IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY COALESCE(split_part(title, ' ', 1), '')
        ORDER BY "count!" DESC
        LIMIT 20
